selected_candidate: Add a fixture and regression that prove AO Mission doctor early-return risk is represented in Command compact readback.
rejected_candidates: Implement Command compact import now; rejected because node 41 owns Command compact import into route reconciliation.
Only update docs; rejected because a machine-checked fixture prevents future readback drift.
Claim promotion readiness; rejected because this is readback quality only and RSI remains denied.
decision_basis: The doctor and Command compact readbacks existed separately; the missing evidence was an explicit binding of early-return denial and exact next action across them.
